batch: Batch137 — P0 Hosted Evidence Capture Pack
phase: P0 hosted proof execution support before P1 feature expansion
purpose: Make the next real hosted proof run explicit, repeatable, auditable, and hard to overclaim. This pack does not deploy to Vercel by itself and does not turn missing Node24/APP_URL/visual proof into a pass.
selectedBecause: Batch136 showed local P0/P1 source stability can be clean while hosted/public proof remains blocked. The next blocker is collecting real Node24 CI, APP_URL hosted smoke, hosted save/export and visual evidence without adding new teacher-facing features.

requiredEvidence.label: Node24 CI/deploy proof
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Run in GitHub Actions or another Node 24 environment, not local Node 22.

requiredEvidence.label: APP_URL strict release smoke
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Use the real Vercel URL after deploy. Optional/empty URL smoke is not enough.

requiredEvidence.label: Hosted real account save/export smoke
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Must register/login, save a lesson and export DOCX/PDF against the hosted URL.

requiredEvidence.label: Real browser visual smoke evidence
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Capture mobile/tablet/desktop screenshots or evidence entries from a real browser. Template alone is not a pass.

requiredEvidence.label: Public rollout readiness board
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Run after all proof artifacts exist; board must keep productionReady false unless full production controls are actually reviewed.

requiredEvidence.label: P0/P1 stability board
requiredEvidence.howToCapture: Run after local P0 evidence and P1 security source evidence.

requiredSignals: save/export controls visible or clearly gated

allowed: Batch137 creates a hosted evidence capture pack and board.
Local P0/P1 can be described only with the commands actually run.
Hosted/public proof remains blocked until real Node24, APP_URL and visual artifacts pass.
blocked: Không nói hosted-demo-closed khi APP_URL strict smoke chưa pass.
Không nói visual smoke pass nếu chỉ có template.
Không nói public rollout allowed nếu public-rollout board vẫn false.
